title: Flow of Exception Propagation Using the 'throw' Keyword
description: A flowchart illustrating how a custom exception is created, thrown, and subsequently handled or propagated in a Java program.
relationships: A method executes code until a throw statement is encountered, which creates and throws an exception object. The JVM searches the call stack for a matching catch block. If found, the program continues from the catch block. If not found, the program terminates.
